allow:
Bash(# Check if the App Service managed identity has Key Vault access
APP_PRINCIPAL="057b8987-203f-44c7-8186-13522e928503"
az role assignment list --assignee $APP_PRINCIPAL --scope "/subscriptions/0f394f87-c8b1-429a-8c86-7e5305042eb9/resourceGroups/options-analyzer-rg/providers/Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/options-analyzer" --output json 2>&1 | grep -v UserWarning | grep -v "32-bit" | python -c "import json,sys; roles=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Roles:', [r['roleDefinitionName'] for r in roles]\) if roles else print\('No roles assigned to App Service identity'\)" 2>/dev/null)
